description: This file defines Express.js routes for recommendations-related API endpoints in a web server. It provides placeholder endpoints for retrieving recommended roles and comparing roles, intended for a Career Navigator app.

methods.name: router.get('/roles')
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve a list of recommended roles, returning a JSON array of role objects.

methods.name: router.post('/compare')
methods.description: Handles POST requests to compare two roles, returning a placeholder comparison result.
